medialive.channel.inputlocation.CfnAbout:
The input location.

The parent of this entity is InputLossBehavior.

medialive.channel.inputlocation.Password.Description: The password parameter that holds the password for accessing the downstream system. This applies only if the downstream system requires credentials.

medialive.channel.inputlocation.Uri.Description: The URI should be a path to a file that is accessible to the Live system (for example, an http:// URI) depending on the output type. For example, an RTMP destination should have a URI similar to rtmp://fmsserver/live.

medialive.channel.inputlocation.Username.Description: The user name to connect to the downstream system. This applies only if the downstream system requires credentials.
